name: job-form-skill
description: 填写求职表单，动态加载行业和职业数据，支持MCP方式提交
author: ANX Team

trigger.description: When user needs to fill job application form, load industry and occupation data dynamically, or submit form via MCP

actions.name: fillJobForm
actions.description: Fill job application form with provided data

actions.name: submitForm
actions.description: Submit form data via MCP API

parameters.formData: Object containing form field values to submit

actions.name: getFormConfig
actions.description: Get form configuration in plain text
